articles.title: How to Watch the World Cup Today: Schedule, Times, TV, Streaming for Messi's Argentina, Colombia, More - FOX Sports
articles.description: Lionel Messi's Argentina, Colombia and Australia headline World Cup Round of 32 action today. Full schedule, kickoff times and how to watch on FOX.
articles.content: Day 23 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup wraps up the Round of 32, and Lionel Messi's Argentina takes center stage against Cinderella story Cape Verde. The day opens in Dallas with Australia and Egypt, wher… [+3612 chars]

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Australian officials ask fans to respect the privacy of Neil, a trouble-making seal - NPR
articles.description: The 5-year-old seal has a social media following twice the size of Tasmania's population, and his antics include bending traffic bollards and blocking roads.
articles.content: WELLINGTON, New Zealand Like plenty of local boys before him, Neil has come home to the stretch of Australian coast where he was born. Unlike most of them, he trails fame, fans and property damage in… [+4711 chars]
